chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P.No.D-3262 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.17980/2025 (U/S 151 CPC) 23.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Abbas, Advocate for the Petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for respondents along with M/s. Kainat Larik & Muhammad Siddique, Advocates. Ms. Rabia Khalid, Asstt. Attorney General. ********** Apparently, after disposal of this petition the goods imported by the petitioner were referred to the Classification Committee, and pending decision thereof, the goods were ordered to be released by the Department under Section 83B of the Customs Act, 1969. However, the petitioner adjudicated the fact that the duty/taxes demanded for provisional release were beyond the amount quoted in the earlier Show Cause Notice. Nevertheless fact of the matter remains that after the disposal of the petitioner the Classification Committee has also been rendered its decision on the imported goods, which has been appealed by the petitioner before the Tribunal. In the given circumstances, we are not inclined to pass any further order in a disposed of matter. Instant CMA accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM
